raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Sober living homes and facilities provide a sober and safe environment for those recovering from Alcohol or Other Drug (AOD) dependency in residential settings.",
    "There are very few regulatory mechanisms available for cities to ensure that sober living homes within their jurisdictions are functioning properly.",
    "The lack of regulatory mechanisms has led to a proliferation of noncompliant sober living residences, which pose public safety issues and involve unregulated patient care.",
    "AB 572 aims to create a voluntary pilot program for cities in Orange County to fund and house a Complaint Analyst to enforce state and local regulations.",
    "The Department of Health Care Services (DHCS) is the only entity authorized to enforce sober living facility regulations and inspect noncompliant residences.",
    "There are only 16 Investigative Complaint Analysts in California managing investigations of noncompliant sober living facilities.",
    "California has nearly 2,000 licensed sober living facilities, with approximately 15% of unlicensed homes located in Orange County."
  ]
}
```
